target_output_schema.name: Date
target_output_schema.rules: Daily granularity required. If source is weekly, note in Spend_Type.

target_output_schema.name: Brand
target_output_schema.rules: Must be one of: StakePoint, WagerLine, NeonSpin, MegaReels.

target_output_schema.name: Campaign
target_output_schema.rules: Campaign name as provided by vendor.

target_output_schema.name: Marketing_Channel
target_output_schema.rules: Must be one of the standardized marketing channels.

target_output_schema.name: Daily_Spend
target_output_schema.rules: USD. Non-negative. Use net spend where both gross and net are available.

target_output_schema.name: Spend_Type
target_output_schema.rules: Actual for source data. Proportioned only for spread weekly/monthly data.
